sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23059" key="gunaikofuh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῠναικο-φῠής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n23059.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">female by nature,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:61:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
